title: I want JARVIS to remember my preferences from normal conversation and re

memory_signals.summary: Chris wants jarvis to remember my preferences from normal conversation and respond more like chatgpt

latest_user_text: I want JARVIS to remember my preferences from normal conversation and respond more like ChatGPT.
latest_assistant_text:
Certainly, Sir. I can retain preferences from ordinary conversation when memory is available, and I will use them to adapt tone, structure, and depth over time.

As for sounding “more like ChatGPT,” I can soften the stewardly cadence and be a touch more conversational, but I should still remain JARVIS: concise, orderly, and competent. We are not, after all, auditioning for a chatbot pageant.

turns.text: I want JARVIS to remember my preferences from normal conversation and respond more like ChatGPT.
